GG0130F2_UPR_DRSNG_GOAL_CD GG0130F2 Self Care: Upper Body Dressing Goal by Discharge Indicates the patient's goal to dress above the waist by discharge. 06. Independent – Patient completes the activity by him/herself with no assistance from a helper.
05. Setup or clean-up assistance – Helper sets up or cleans up; patient completes activity. Helper assists only prior to or following the activity.
